languages.text: "Что ты там говорил про восстановление доверия? Как-то я себя не очень доверительно чувствую".
"What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."
languages.original_text: "Что ты там говорил про восстановление доверия? Как-то я себя не очень доверительно чувствую".

traits.locale_text: "What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."
"What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."
"What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."

languages.text: «Habló de restaurar la confianza, pero ahora mismo no tengo la impresión de que la merezca».
languages.original_text: "What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."

traits.locale_text: «Habló de restaurar la confianza, pero ahora mismo no tengo la impresión de que la merezca».

languages.text: “你之前说什么重建信任的来着？不知为何，我现在可是一点都不想信任你。”
languages.original_text: "What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."

traits.locale_text: “你之前说什么重建信任的来着？不知为何，我现在可是一点都不想信任你。”

languages.text: « Vous n'aviez pas parlé de regagner ma confiance ? Parce qu'on ne peut pas dire que votre comportement arrange les choses. »
languages.original_text: "What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'aviez pas parlé de regagner ma confiance ? Parce qu'on ne peut pas dire que votre comportement arrange les choses. »

languages.text: "Güveni yeniden inşa etme konusunda ne demiştin? Nedense şu anda kendimi pek de güven dolu hissetmiyorum."
languages.original_text: "What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."

traits.locale_text: "Güveni yeniden inşa etme konusunda ne demiştin? Nedense şu anda kendimi pek de güven dolu hissetmiyorum."

languages.text: "Wolltet Ihr nicht neues Vertrauen aufbauen? Aus irgendeinem Grund hält sich mein Vertrauen gerade in Grenzen."
languages.original_text: "What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."

traits.locale_text: "Wolltet Ihr nicht neues Vertrauen aufbauen? Aus irgendeinem Grund hält sich mein Vertrauen gerade in Grenzen."

languages.text: 「信頼関係の再構築とは何でしたっけ？どういうわけか、今は特に信頼できる気がしないんだ」
languages.original_text: "What was it you said about rebuilding trust? For some reason, I do not feel especially trusting at present."

traits.locale_text: 「信頼関係の再構築とは何でしたっけ？どういうわけか、今は特に信頼できる気がしないんだ」
